who: hospitality managers in restaurants processing 5–15 schedules/week
offer: For hospitality managers in restaurants processing 5–15 schedules/week, inefficient manual scheduling causes overtime errors and employee dissatisfaction. We automate shift scheduling instead of manual scheduling spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient manual scheduling leads to overtime errors and employee dissatisfaction.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for hospitality management
Engage on Indie Hackers about scheduling tools
DM outreach to hospitality managers with demo links
Share insights in community forums for restaurant managers
try_it: Let users try a drag-and-drop scheduling tool for free
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a compelling CTA
Produce a short demo video of the tool
Offer early access to first 10 sign-ups
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving of common scheduling templates
Set default reminders for scheduling tasks
Enable CSV import for existing employee data
Provide one-click export for schedule reports
